name: Jiuyuan
description: Anima support who tends the party like a gardener—healing breaths, gentle buffs, and a mellow presence that pairs naturally with other life-aligned allies.

seo.title: Jiuyuan — Support
seo.description: Jiuyuan offers Anima support in Neverness to Everness—party care, soft utility, and a supportive identity rooted in growth and recovery.
